settings_account_desc: Username, password and default panel language
settings_password_hint: Leave blank to keep current password
settings_wc_note: Payments run via WooCommerce — set Client DNS on this page so WooCommerce orders get DNS automatically.
settings_connect_host_desc: A domain pointing to this server's IP — used in VLESS, WireGuard, OpenVPN, and other new configs instead of the raw IP. Existing configs are not changed.
settings_connect_host_enable: Enabled — use domain in new configs
settings_connect_host_domain_hint: Hostname only — no http:// and no port. A record must point to this server's IP.
settings_usage_sync_desc: How often the server reads VPN traffic and disables configs over volume or time limit. Lower interval = more up-to-date numbers but more CPU/RAM. Adjust based on your VPS size.
settings_usage_sync_enable_hint: When disabled, usage is not updated automatically — use manual sync on the Services page or run: sudo php cron/native-limits.php
settings_usage_sync_interval_hint: Recommended: 15–30 min on weak VPS (1–2 GB RAM), 5–10 min on stronger servers. Minimum 1, maximum 120.
settings_usage_sync_disable_note: Configs that exceed their volume or expiry are automatically deactivated on each sync.
settings_usage_sync_last: Last sync: %s — %d usage record(s) updated, %d service(s) disabled.
settings_usage_sync_force_pending: Manual sync requested — will run on the next cron check (within 1 minute).
settings_panel_access_desc: Domain and port for this admin panel — e.g. panel.example.com:8082 instead of IP. Saving updates nginx and config.php on the server.
settings_panel_access_domain_enable: Enabled — use domain to access the panel
settings_panel_access_domain_hint: A record → this server IP. No http:// — set port in the field below.
settings_panel_access_port_hint: nginx listen port on the server (usually 8082). With Cloudflare SSL, users open https://your-domain — no port in the URL.
settings_panel_access_https_hint: For Cloudflare: enable orange-cloud proxy and SSL (Full or Flexible). Panel URL becomes https://panel.example.com (no :8082).
settings_panel_access_ip_blocked: Direct IP:port access is blocked — use the panel domain only.
settings_panel_access_domain_lock_note: When domain is enabled, IP:8082 login is automatically disabled.
settings_panel_access_warn: You may be redirected to the new URL. If the port changed, update bookmarks, WooCommerce API URL, etc.
settings_panel_access_err_domain: Panel domain is invalid or empty
settings_panel_access_err_script: apply-panel-access.sh missing on server — update the panel
settings_panel_access_err_nginx_test: Invalid nginx config — changes were not applied
settings_panel_access_err_apply: Failed to apply panel settings — check sudo or nginx
settings_client_dns_desc: Default DNS for all new configs — manual, WooCommerce, and API. Avoid 1.1.1.1/8.8.8.8 on restricted networks.
settings_client_dns_enable: Enabled — apply automatically to new configs
guides_intro: unlimitsky runs on your host; configs are created via Marzban or Sanaei (3x-ui) API on a VPS.
guides_read_first: Read the guide before adding a panel.
panels_sanaei_link_template: Sanaei link template (%s1 uuid, %s2 host:port, %s3 remark)
panels_save_ok_marzban: Panel saved and Marzban connection OK
panels_save_fail_marzban: Panel saved but Marzban connection failed
panels_save_ok_sanaei: Panel saved and Sanaei connection OK
panels_save_fail_sanaei: Panel saved but Sanaei connection failed
install_sub: Choose language, admin account and database
home_tagline: VPN reseller panel — connect your WooCommerce store
login_username_note: Enter the username you set in panel Settings — it may not be admin.
login_locked: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
must_change_pass: Please change the default password in Settings.
password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
update_outdated: Deployed version differs from latest GitHub commit — update if needed.
update_legacy_warning: Some new panel features are missing — run Update from GitHub once.
update_features_missing: Features below are incomplete — an update is recommended.
update_run_desc: Fetches the latest unlimitsky-client release and deploys to /var/www/unlimitsky. Database and config.php are kept. Update runs in the background to avoid 502 errors.
update_started_async: Update started in the background — this page will refresh every few seconds.
update_running_hint: This may take a few minutes. php-fpm will restart briefly — if the page drops, reopen this URL after a few seconds.
update_ssh_desc: If the button above fails, run one of these on the server (no 502):
update_script_missing: Update script not found. Run once via SSH: sudo bash /opt/unlimitsky/scripts/update-panel.sh /var/www/unlimitsky /opt/unlimitsky
update_sudo_hint: Requires sudo for www-data — configured automatically after the first SSH install/update.
license_intro: Pro from unlimitsky vendor — unlock more plans to sell to your customers.
license_free_note: Get your Pro key from your unlimitsky platform vendor.
license_migration_intro: Backup imported. Pro was tied to the old VPS IP and instance ID and must be activated again on this server.
license_migration_step_vendor: Ask your license vendor to update the Pro key to your new VPS IP or reset the old instance binding.
license_migration_step_activate: Enter the same key below and click Activate.
license_migration_note: Until re-activation, Marzban/Sanaei and extra plans stay on the Free tier.
license_err_ip_mismatch: This VPS IP does not match the IP on your license — ask the vendor to update it.
license_err_instance_mismatch: This key is still bound to the old VPS — ask the vendor to reset the instance.
license_err_bound_other_instance: This key is active on another server — ask the vendor to approve the transfer.
license_err_license_server_not_configure: License vendor not reachable — install vendor on this VPS or set license_server in config.
license_vendor_not_configured: No license vendor found. Install unlimitsky-license on this server or set license_server + license_api_token.
license_vendor_auto_note: Registration runs automatically when you log in to this panel (about every 15 minutes).
plan_limit_reached: Free plan limit — upgrade to Pro
plan_free_banner: Free tier — max 1 plan for your shop
plan_free_edit_note: You can edit or delete your saved plan anytime — only adding extra plans requires Pro.
panels_pro_banner: Marzban and Sanaei (3x-ui) panels require a Pro license — for creating configs on external panels.
panels_pro_required: Marzban/Sanaei panels are available on Pro only.
protocols_intro: Protocols install directly on this VPS.
protocol_install_confirm: Install this protocol on the server?
protocol_install_started: Install started in the background — this page refreshes every 15 seconds.
protocol_installing_hint: Amnezia install may take a few minutes. Keep this tab open; it will refresh automatically.
protocol_install_running: A previous install is still running.
protocol_reinstall_confirm: Reinstall this protocol? Server config will be refreshed (existing users kept where possible). Port settings below will be applied.
protocol_reinstalled_warn: Service is active but the panel script did not return USK_OK (often timeout). Log: %s
create_config_port_hint: Port used in the client config (must match the server — change in Protocols if needed)
create_xray_ports_hint: VLESS + Reality on TCP port (default 443). Install/reinstall from Protocols. Clients: v2rayN, Nekoray, Hiddify.
protocol_xray_iran_note: VLESS + Reality + Vision — best for MCI/Irancell. Traffic mimics real HTTPS. IPv4 only. Set custom DNS (1.1.1.1/8.8.8.8 may fail on national network).
create_client_dns_hint: Optional — if empty, panel DNS settings (Settings page) are used.
xray_vless_hint: Import in v2rayN / Nekoray / Hiddify. Or download JSON profile (recommended — includes DNS).
create_openvpn_proto_hint: In Iran UDP is often blocked — use TCP (port 443) when possible.
create_wireguard_transport_hint: TCP uses udp2raw bridge — run udp2raw on Windows/Linux before WireGuard. Phone WireGuard apps cannot run udp2raw (use UDP on mobile). QR is UDP only.
create_wg_tcp_hint: Run this in a terminal before enabling WireGuard. Endpoint 127.0.0.1 is correct — do not change it. AllowedIPs 0.0.0.0/0 is correct for full internet.
protocol_amnezia_note: AmneziaWG 2.0 — Amnezia VPN app only (QR or vpn://). AmneziaWG app needs .conf file only (official docs: no QR for native format). UDP port up to 9999 (default 443).
protocol_l2tp_iran_note: L2TP/IPsec is UDP-only (500, 4500, 1701) — often blocked in Iran. Prefer OpenVPN TCP or Xray.
amnezia_qr_hint: Per Amnezia docs: QR is only for the Amnezia VPN app. AmneziaWG does not support QR.
amnezia_import_link_hint: In Amnezia VPN: + → Paste from clipboard. Copy the full key.
amnezia_wg_conf_hint: In AmneziaWG app: + → Import from file. Official docs do not support QR for this format.
err_amnezia_not_installed: AmneziaWG not installed — install from Protocols page
err_amnezia_install_failed: AmneziaWG install failed — on server: git pull && sudo bash bin/repair-amnezia.sh
err_amnezia_userspace_install_failed: AmneziaWG install failed — on server: git pull && sudo bash bin/repair-amnezia.sh
err_amnezia_go_download_failed: amneziawg-go download/build failed — install Docker or: sudo apt install -y golang-go && git pull && sudo bash /var/www/unlimitsky/bin/repair-amnezia.sh
err_amnezia_tools_install_failed: Failed to install awg/awg-quick — unzip or python3 required on server
err_wireguard_not_installed: WireGuard is not installed — install it from Protocols
err_wireguard_interface_down: WireGuard interface (wg0) is down — run: sudo bash /var/www/unlimitsky/bin/repair-wireguard.sh 51822
err_wireguard_conf_invalid: WireGuard server config (wg0.conf) is invalid — run repair-wireguard.sh
err_wireguard_peer_sync_failed: Could not add peer to WireGuard — run repair-wireguard.sh and try again
err_wireguard_server_key_missing: WireGuard server public key missing — reinstall or run repair-wireguard.sh
err_wireguard_tcp_not_installed: WireGuard TCP bridge (udp2raw) is not active — on server: sudo rm -f /usr/local/bin/udp2raw && sudo bash /var/www/unlimitsky/bin/repair-wireguard.sh 51822
err_wireguard_tcp_port_in_use: TCP bridge port is already in use (OpenVPN may use 443) — try 51822 instead
err_wireguard_tcp_bridge_failed: WireGuard TCP bridge (udp2raw) failed to start — check journalctl -u udp2raw-wg or run repair-wireguard.sh
err_wireguard_udp2raw_download_failed: Could not install udp2raw on server (download/compile failed) — run: sudo rm -f /usr/local/bin/udp2raw && sudo bash /var/www/unlimitsky/bin/repair-wireguard.sh 51822
err_wireguard_udp2raw_binary_bad: udp2raw binary on server is corrupt (0 bytes or invalid) — run: sudo rm -f /usr/local/bin/udp2raw && sudo bash /var/www/unlimitsky/bin/repair-wireguard.sh 51822
protocol_wg_tcp_port_hint: Port 443 is used by OpenVPN TCP — use 51822 for WireGuard bridge.
err_xray_restart_failed: Xray could not restart after adding user — check: systemctl status xray
err_cisco_not_installed: Cisco AnyConnect is not installed — install it from Protocols first
err_openvpn_not_installed: OpenVPN is not installed — install it from Protocols first
err_openvpn_tcp_not_installed: OpenVPN TCP server is not installed — reinstall OpenVPN from Protocols (UDP + TCP)
err_l2tp_install_failed: L2TP/IPsec install failed — on the server run: apt install strongswan xl2tpd ppp
err_l2tp_service_failed: L2TP packages installed but xl2tpd is not running — check: journalctl -u xl2tpd
err_l2tp_not_installed: L2TP/IPsec is not installed — install it from Protocols first
protocol_sudo_note: Add these lines to visudo for panel installs and WooCommerce provisioning:
protocol_sudo_provision_note: Also allow add-user scripts for automatic config creation (WooCommerce):
api_keys_intro: Create API keys to connect WooCommerce plugin to this panel. After payment, configs are created on native protocols (WireGuard, OpenVPN, Xray, L2TP).
api_key_created: API key created — copy it now
api_key_copy_warning: Store this key securely. It will not be shown again.
api_wc_step2: Create an API key here and copy it
api_wc_step3: In WordPress: unlimitsky → Panels → Add panel → Type: unlimitsky (native)
api_wc_step4: Enter API URL + API key, create VPN product, sell
wireguard_qr_hint: Scan with the WireGuard app on your phone.
service_config_missing: Config link unavailable — update panel files or recreate the service.
limits_cron_intro: Every 2 minutes: usage sync and expired/over-limit accounts are disabled on the server. Records stay in the Services list.
limits_cron_auto_note: Install/update sets up /etc/cron.d/unlimitsky-limits automatically — no manual cron needed.
connections_cron_auto_note: Concurrent connection enforcement runs every 5 min via /etc/cron.d/unlimitsky-connections — auto on install/update.
limits_cron_expiry: All protocols: disable connection when duration ends
limits_cron_volume: WireGuard: disable when traffic exceeds plan volume (GB)
limits_cron_connections: Xray/OpenVPN: drop extra sessions when concurrent connections exceed plan slot limit
limits_cron_manual_note: Account is NOT deleted — see ended services in Panel → Services, extend to renew, or delete from server manually.
services_intro: Ended accounts are disabled on server (no connection) but listed here. Extend to renew or remove from server when you decide. Usage updates automatically; «Refresh usage now» is only for an instant, on-demand read.
services_sync_hint: Usage is calculated and saved automatically every %d minutes (Settings → Usage sync). No manual action is needed — the button below is only if you want to see live usage right now, without waiting.
services_sync_busy: Sync already running — wait a few seconds and try again.
services_sync_queued: Sync queued — runs within 1 minute. Then refresh the page.
services_sync_ok: Done — %d usage record(s) updated, %d service(s) checked, %d disabled (volume/time ended).
services_sync_diag_collect_failed: Warning: traffic collection failed — check sudoers and jq.
services_sync_diag_collect_parse: Warning: collect-usage-stats output invalid — is jq installed?
services_sync_diag_node_errors: Warning: stats from %d node(s) failed (SSH/collect on node).
services_sync_diag_node_hint: Service runs on a Node — re-run install-node or update node scripts so collect-usage-stats is present.
services_sync_diag_no_sudo: Warning: sudo for traffic collection is missing — on server run install sudoers or: sudo bash install/lib.sh
services_sync_diag_xray_stats: Warning: Xray API returned no user stats — run once: sudo bash bin/xray-fix-stats-api.sh
services_sync_diag_openvpn_status: Warning: OpenVPN status logs missing — run: sudo bash bin/openvpn-fix-status.sh
services_sync_failed: Usage update failed. Run on the server: sudo php /var/www/unlimitsky/cron/native-limits.php — then check PHP error log.
services_sync_last: Last update: %s — %d usage saved, %d disabled, %d checked.
services_sync_never: Usage not updated yet — click the button above.
stats_live_hint: Usage updates every %d minutes on the server — refresh this page to see latest numbers
portal_stats_live: Usage updates every %d minutes — refresh the page
portal_connections_live: Connections update every %d minutes — refresh the page
services_ended_count: %d account(s) ended — review and extend or remove.
services_empty: No services yet. Create a config from «Create config» — it will appear here.
services_search_hint: Type at least 2 characters — usage and link to extend appear instantly.
services_search_empty: No service found for this code.
users_intro: Legacy section for Telegram bot customers (wallet balance, block/unblock). For VPN configs you sell, use «Services» — not this page.
service_disabled_notice: This account is disabled — customer cannot connect. Use Extend to renew and re-enable.
create_intro: Build a config manually (volume + days) or pick a saved plan. Native protocols use your VPS directly.
create_order_save_failed: VPN was created on server but saving to Services list failed — run DB repair (see docs)
create_customer_email_hint: Saved on every native service. For Xray this value is written to client.email and used by Stats API usage sync.
err_sudo_denied: Panel cannot run VPN scripts (sudo). Re-run the install command or fix /etc/sudoers.d/unlimitsky
err_xray_not_installed: Xray is not installed on the server — install it from Protocols first
err_jq_required: jq is missing on the server — run: apt install jq
err_xray_not_running: Xray is not listening — reinstall from Protocols on port 443 and open TCP in VPS firewall
err_xray_config_invalid: Xray config is invalid — reinstall from Protocols
err_xray_reality_keygen_failed: Reality key generation failed — on server: git pull && sudo bash bin/repair-xray.sh 443 (new Xray x25519 output format)
err_provision_failed: Could not run provisioning script on the server
create_manual_invalid: Volume and duration cannot be negative (0 = unlimited)
create_manual_pro_required: "Enter manually" is available on the Pro plan only — upgrade to Pro to use it.
create_manual_pro_note: "Enter manually" is Pro-only; free users can only use saved plans.
service_extend_hint: Add days and/or GB — status becomes active again. VPN config on server is kept.
service_remove_hint: Deletes VPN user from server — use when customer will not renew.
service_remove_confirm: Remove this user from the VPN server?
service_delete_record_confirm: Delete this row from panel only? (does not remove from server)
service_marked_notice: This service is expired or over traffic limit. Extend to renew, or remove from server if the customer will not continue.
backup_v1_intro: v2 backup: panel data (plans, services, client registry, panel/WC URLs, DNS, admin). After VPS migration, reinstall protocols and re-apply panel access in Settings.
backup_export_desc: Downloads a .uskbackup file. Store it securely — it contains sensitive settings.
backup_import_desc: Upload a .uskbackup from your old server to restore the panel.
backup_import_warning: Current panel data (plans, services, settings) will be replaced by the backup.
backup_import_confirm: I understand current data will be replaced.
backup_zip_missing: PHP ZipArchive is required for backup export/import.
backup_zip_install_hint: On small VPS prefer SSH above — the button may stall apt.
backup_zip_install_started: ZipArchive install started — wait 20–30s, the page will refresh.
backup_zip_install_cancelled: Install status reset. If apt is stuck on the server, use SSH below.
backup_zip_install_stale: Install took over 5 minutes — apt may be stuck. Reboot VPS from hosting panel or SSH:
backup_zip_ssh_fix:
sudo apt update
sudo apt install -y PHP_ZIP_PKG
sudo systemctl restart php*-fpm
php -r "var_dump(class_exists('ZipArchive'));"
backup_zip_install_manual: Install script missing. Via SSH: sudo bash /var/www/unlimitsky/bin/install-php-zip.sh
backup_zip_installed: ZipArchive installed — you can use backup now.
backup_import_ok: Backup restored successfully (%d SQL statements, %d files).
backup_includes_db: Database: plans (incl. connections), services, panels, admin user
backup_includes_data: Files: protocol status, client registry (tokens, usage), all settings
backup_includes_urls: Panel URL, WooCommerce shop, connect host, config DNS
backup_import_note_vpn: VPN is not auto-installed on the new server — install from Protocols.
backup_import_note_license_v2: If you had Pro: after import you are sent to License — activate your key again (license cache is not imported).
backup_import_ok_relicense: Backup restored (%d SQL statements, %d files). Re-activate Pro on the License page.
backup_import_note_api: If API keys fail, create a new key and update WooCommerce.
backup_import_note_reapply: Public URL restored to %s — open Settings → Panel access and click Apply on the new server.
backup_import_note_reapply_generic: Open Settings → Panel access and click Apply on the new server.
plan_connections_hint: Maximum devices that can connect at the same time. Enforced when each device connects — no background polling.
plan_code_hint: Used in WooCommerce and API — does not change when editing.
plan_renewal_note: Time/volume renewal plans (extend) — coming to web admin in a future update.
portal_customer_link_hint: Share this link with the buyer — config and service status are always available here.
portal_error_unsupported: This service type is not supported on the public page.
portal_usage_na: Usage stats are not tracked for this protocol.
portal_qr_hint: Scan QR with your VPN app
portal_wg_tcp_hint: WireGuard TCP needs udp2raw running on your PC before you connect. Android/iOS WireGuard apps cannot do this — use UDP on phones or connect from Windows/Linux.
portal_wg_tcp_steps: 1) Run the command above in a terminal (admin/root). 2) Wait for ready. 3) Import the config below and connect WireGuard. Endpoint 127.0.0.1 and AllowedIPs 0.0.0.0/0 are correct.
portal_wg_tcp_download_hint: Download the config, run udp2raw first (see above), then import into WireGuard on Windows or Linux.
portal_download_hint: Download the file and import it into your VPN app.
portal_apps_hint: Install the app for your platform:
portal_renew_hint: Choose a plan to add time and volume to this config. After payment, the same connection details stay active.
portal_renew_protocol_note: Only %s renewal products from the shop can be used for this config.
settings_woo_shop_desc: Your WordPress/WooCommerce store URL. Buyers use it from the service page to renew the same config.
settings_woo_shop_enable: Enable renewal links on customer portal
settings_woo_shop_url_hint: Example: https://shop.example.com — no trailing slash required.
settings_woo_shop_renew_note: Create WooCommerce products with the same plan code and protocol as each service. Renewal always keeps the same protocol (Xray cannot renew as OpenVPN).
nodes_intro: Node servers run configs on remote VPS instances. The Hub connects via SSH — no per-node token.
nodes_sshpass_missing: On the Hub server run: apt install sshpass
nodes_install_steps: Run the installer on the Node VPS:
nodes_step_run_on_remote: Run the install command on the second VPS
nodes_step_enter_credentials: Enter Hub IP/port, this server's SSH user/password, and buyer connect address
nodes_rotate_confirm: Rotate registration password? New nodes must use the new password.
nodes_xray_only: Only Xray is supported on nodes for now.
create_node_hint: Nodes support Xray only. VLESS links use the node's IP/domain.
